subtitles.text: Most see the website. This is the governance layer behind it.
VCMS orchestrates 8 repositories, enforcing a Single Source of Truth.
Before any deployment, a system-wide scan is executed.
It detects code drifts across canonical brains, backlogs, and guardrails.
Zero conflicts means we are clear to ship. Every action is secured in the audit log.
KODA, our read-only RAG assistant, analyzes the ecosystem context in real-time.
But AI doesn't publish autonomously. The system proposes; a human approves.
Fewer surprises. Controlled changes. Documented handovers.
